title.en: Heat exchanger knowledge guide added to Knowledge
title.zh: 知识库新增换热器图文导读

summary.en: New illustrated page: cycle roles, families, LMTD and approach, duty reading, frost/fouling/oil, high-temperature heat-pump duty, and a selection checklist.
summary.zh: 新增图文专页：循环角色、结构家族、接近温度与流路、工况读法、结霜结垢与回油、高温热泵要点与选型清单。

title.en: Valve knowledge guide added to Knowledge
title.zh: 知识库新增阀件图文导读

summary.en: New illustrated page: cycle roles, TXV/EEV, reversing and system valves, water-side boundary, common faults, and a selection checklist—with links to heat exchangers, compressors, and refrigerants.
summary.zh: 新增图文专页：循环角色、TXV/EEV、换向与系统阀、水路边界、常见故障与选型清单；并链至换热器、压缩机与制冷剂百科。

title.en: Week 29 2026 Refrigeration & Heat Pump Industry Briefing
title.zh: 2026年第29周制冷与热泵行业简报

summary.en: Daikin NEXIO Max R32 rooftop HP (NA); AHRI May shipments +6.7%; France Qlima R290 monobloc recall (install height); MHI 10 MW data-centre chiller; China 1 Jul cluster week three; EPA TT final rule ~8 days to 27 Jul
summary.zh: Daikin 北美 NEXIO Max R32 屋顶机；AHRI 5月出货 +6.7%；法国 Qlima R290 单体式召回（安装高度）；MHI 10 MW 数据中心冷水机；国内 7/1 集群第三周；EPA 技术转换终稿 7/27 倒计时约8天

title.en: Compressor knowledge guide added to Knowledge
title.zh: 知识库新增压缩机图文导读

summary.en: New illustrated page: cycle role, machine families, hermetic construction, performance maps, oil return, high-lift heat-pump duty, and a selection checklist—with links to the 匹 chapter, refrigerants, HTHP, and OEM tools.
summary.zh: 新增图文专页：循环角色、机型家族、全封/半封结构、性能图读法、回油与可靠性、大温升热泵要点与选型清单；并链至「匹」专章、制冷剂百科、工业高温热泵与 OEM 工具。

title.zh: Annex 68 与 IEA HPT 最新进展简报

summary.en: Restored Project 68 note page: Vienna HPC workshop (80+ participants), Task 1 database at 55+ suppliers and 40+ demo cases, sector integration templates, and Skills4HP updates.
summary.zh: 修复 Project 68 独立页并更新至 7 月版：维也纳热泵大会工作坊（80+ 参与者）、Task 1 数据库 55+ 供方与 40+ 示范案例、行业集成模版与 Skills4HP 进展。

title.en: Site navigation simplified — Content, Knowledge, Tools & Standards
title.zh: 内容板块归并：内容中心 / 知识库 / 工具与标准

summary.en: Nav reduced to three hubs: Content (briefings, insights, industry notes), Knowledge (fundamentals, refrigerants guide + property table, industrial HTHP), and Tools & Standards (standards, policies, links). Old URLs redirect.
summary.zh: 导航收敛为三大入口：内容中心（简报、洞察、行业观察）、知识库（基础、制冷剂百科含工质表、工业高温热泵）、工具与标准（标准、政策、外链合一）。旧 URL 已设重定向。

title.en: What's New — stay current at a glance

summary.en: A bell icon in the nav shows recent briefings, insights, and page updates when you return.
summary.zh: 导航栏铃铛入口可查看最新周报、洞察与页面更新，回访即可掌握动态。

title.en: Industrial heat pump policies page expanded
title.zh: 工业热泵政策页深度解读更新

summary.en: Added NDRC 698 nine-sector retrofit plan analysis and green-power consumption rules (Order 42) synergy notes.
summary.zh: 增补发改环资〔2026〕698 号九大行业改造清单解读，以及绿电消费与设备更新协同合规路径。
